data_rights_status.license_or_terms: public benchmark or institutional public page; no raw clinical records stored

modality_map.observed_signal: benchmark task trace and modality description
modality_map.durable_endpoint: validated discovery-memory packet that can be reused without leaking raw subjects
known_failure_modes: site-specific missingness hidden by aggregate scoring

task_fit.intended_task: screen whether a research packet may enter reusable discovery memory
task_fit.why_this_modality_is_sufficient_or_not: Public benchmark and institutional metadata can define admission requirements, but real deployment needs curator labels and local privacy review.

missing_time_windows: longitudinal follow-up window not available in synthetic fixture

revision_reason: Frontier scientific and medical AI benchmarks increasingly rely on realistic task traces and modality-specific evaluation, but discovery memory also needs explicit reuse rights.
falsification_route: If curator review shows that data-rights and modality-fit fields do not reduce blocked, unsafe, or low-fitness memory promotions, simplify or revise the gate.
next_executable_action: Run validator on fixtures, then wire this gate before discovery-memory packet promotion.
